title: Kangaroo anti-punch-farming feedback added
summary: Kangaroo prompt context and logger feedback now explicitly identify high-score-without-climbing behavior as punch farming rather than a solved Kangaroo policy. This prepares future Kangaroo outer-loop runs to target ladder-route behavior instead of optimizing the lower-platform monkey shortcut.

context.reason_for_change: Exact replay showed that a 3600-point retuned patch-2 episode had 18 RIGHTFIRE rewards and zero UP actions, so reward alone was misleading.

changes.purpose: Updated Kangaroo environment description, design principles, failure modes, and improvement guidelines to warn against lower-platform punch farming and require ladder-route progress.
Added Kangaroo metrics for punch_action_rate, rightfire_action_rate, leftfire_action_rate, score_without_climb_pattern, and punch_farming_pattern.

verification.result: Generated feedback now tells the LLM that scoring without UP/climbing is not a proper Kangaroo solution and asks for route state: approach reachable ladder, climb, dismount, then select the next upward target.

interpretation: This does not make Kangaroo solved.
It improves the next Kangaroo attempt by giving the outer loop a concrete behavioral diagnostic for the latest shortcut.
The next paid Kangaroo run should be judged on both score and ladder-route metrics.

rq_mapping.RQ1: Prepares future Kangaroo runs to produce a more task-appropriate policy instead of only a higher score.
rq_mapping.RQ2: Directly addresses a shortcut identified by trace replay: punch farming with no climbing.
rq_mapping.RQ4: Keeps parameter optimization useful while preventing the optimizer from silently rewarding only the punch shortcut.

recommended_next_steps: If running Kangaroo again, run an outer loop with these updated diagnostics and inspect logger metrics before interpreting score.
Send Quentin both the original one-pixel-overlap GIF and the retuned punch-farming GIF so he can see the before/after diagnosis.
Do not promote Kangaroo until a candidate shows both high reward and nonzero ladder-route behavior.
